title: Chat Flagging Protocol
caseIdentifier: User issue requires escalation to internal team (Ops, Finance, Tech, or other departments)
description: Standard protocol for flagging chats to internal teams with proper documentation and follow-up procedures

steps.title: Determine Flagging Need
steps.description: Identify if the issue requires internal team escalation
instructions: Review the Decision Table to determine if flagging is required

Issues that require flagging: bugs/tech issues, transaction/refund issues, ops issues (ETA, customs, lost packages, RTO, SKU, engraving), central requests, unresolvable with standard troubleshooting, or distress-related cases
Issues that DON'T require flagging: fully solved with user confirmation, feedback/feature requests shared, refund/replacement already processed, or waiting for user reply after partial solution

steps.title: Follow Flagging Process
steps.description: Execute proper flagging procedure based on channel
instructions: FOR EMAILS: Follow flagged process → paste flagged URL in 'Flagged Link' box (Details section) → send Holding message → change status to ON-HOLD
FOR CHATS: Follow flagged process → paste flagged URL in 'Flagged Link' box (Details section) → send Holding message → assign chat to FLAGGED QUEUE and agent Mukesh Kumar

After carefully reviewing your issue, we've determined that it needs to be escalated to our internal team for a thorough check. We've raised it with the concerned team, and typically this process takes less than 48 hours. In rare cases, it may take up to 72 hours. Please rest assured—we'll keep this chat open and update you as soon as we have a resolution.
Always leave a summary note when flagging a chat with full context

steps.title: Set Clear Expectations
steps.description: Communicate expected timelines based on issue type
instructions: Logistics ETA: 24-48 hours
Customs: 2-3 working days
Shipment redirection: 2-3 working days
Label: 24-48 hours
Refund: 3-5 working days (for refund initiation from finance)
Invoice validation: 2-3 working days
Tech: 24-48 hours
Legal: 2-3 working days
If no update by end of duration, send message asking for more time

steps.title: Follow-Up Guidelines
steps.description: Manage flagged chat follow-ups appropriately
instructions: If chat is ACTIVE → Respond to customer and try to solve
If chat is INACTIVE → Follow up with internal team
If team replies → Update the customer immediately
If no reply → Mark 'no update' in internal notes until next follow-up
If update received: Relay to user, snooze chat for customer reply, reassign to main queue
Once user responds and chat reopens, treat as regular live chat

steps.title: Escalate if Delayed
steps.description: Escalate to leads if resolution is delayed beyond expected timeline
steps.resolution: Chat properly flagged with appropriate team, timeline expectations set, follow-up protocol established
instructions: If flagged chat goes beyond 2 days without resolution → Highlight to leads: @Parth Saluja @Vishal @Trishala @Shanon @Twinkle @Ashad @Shalm @Govind @Sanil Sharma
This is taking longer than expected, but our team is actively working on it. We apologize for the delay.
Keep chat flagged and ensure resolution is tracked

Sample Response: 'We understand your concern. However, we want to clarify that while we do our best to provide transparency about potential customs charges, these fees are determined and levied by your country's customs department and are beyond our control. Once the payment is made, your order will be delivered.'

steps.title: Ring Stuck in Customs Clearance

instructions: Advise user to check email (including spam/junk folders) for message from DHL requesting documents/information

Sample Response: 'Could you please check for an email from DHL regarding this order? They will have sent you a link with the customs clearance requirements. You can share those details with them and your order will be processed accordingly.'

Flag to Mario on #cx_ops_escalations and fill ops-escalation-form

title: Legal Escalations - Fraud Investigation Protocol
caseIdentifier: Case shows possible fraud, delivery disputes, suspicious replacement patterns, or requires legal review
description: Comprehensive fraud investigation protocol before legal escalation

steps.title: Identify Fraud Indicators
steps.description: Recognize red flags requiring investigation
instructions: RED FLAGS: Multiple logged-in email addresses for same ring, multiple reachouts from different emails about same ring, confusion about ring-box association, unable/unwilling to provide invoice, user disputes delivery ('marked delivered but not received'), multiple lost-in-transit claims, repeated replacement requests with mismatched history or manipulated addresses, inconsistent/incomplete/contradictory facts
WHEN TO INITIATE: Delivery disputes, multiple lost claims, repeated replacements with suspicious patterns, any case where facts are inconsistent
Maintain neutral, non-accusatory tone throughout

steps.title: PAUSE All Actions Immediately
steps.description: Stop all replacements/refunds pending investigation
instructions: Do NOT issue replacement or refund until investigation complete
Inform user case is under review (neutral language)
Use tone: 'We're reviewing this for you', 'Working with shipping partner to get full clarity', 'Want to ensure we resolve correctly', 'Team currently investigating delivery details'
AVOID: Accusing user of fraud, suggesting blame, making commitments before investigation complete, sharing internal suspicion flags

steps.title: Compile Full Order History
steps.description: Create comprehensive timeline of all associated orders
instructions: Prepare clear summary covering ALL linked orders
Include: original shipment, replacement orders (if any), tracking details for each dispatch, delivery scan timestamps, user communication timelines
Create single consolidated timeline for Legal/SME to easily review
Document any address changes across orders

steps.title: Request OPS Shipping Partner Verification
steps.description: Get detailed delivery verification from carrier
instructions: Request from OPS team (they will contact shipping partner) for EACH 'lost in transit' or 'not received' claim:

Delivery status confirmation, GPS coordinates of delivery, delivery photo (if available), driver notes, confirmation correct address was used, scan history from pickup → transit → delivery, any internal flags raised by courier
Wait for OPS verification results before proceeding

steps.title: Conduct Thorough Fraud Check
steps.description: Complete comprehensive internal investigation
instructions: ✔ CUSTOMER PATTERN REVIEW: How many past replacements? Any previously flagged behavior? Account creation date vs order behavior?
✔ ADDRESS VERIFICATION: Address mismatch across orders? Frequent changes before dispatch?
✔ DEVICE/SERIAL NUMBER HISTORY: Multiple 'lost' rings tied to same customer? Return not received (for return-required cases)? Mismatch in activation patterns?
✔ COMMUNICATION CONSISTENCY: Conflicting user statements? Signs of template/automated responses? Possible edited invoices? User refusing to share evidence or claiming urgency?
Document all findings systematically

steps.title: SME/Leads Review (MANDATORY)
steps.description: Get approval before legal escalation
instructions: Complete full investigation checklist above FIRST
Share compiled summary with SME/Lead
Wait for their review and confirmation
They will guide whether Legal escalation is appropriate
NEVER directly escalate to Legal without SME/Lead validation

conditions.conditionText: Did SME/Lead approve legal escalation?

steps.title: No Legal Escalation Needed
steps.description: SME/Lead determined case doesn't require legal involvement
steps.resolution: Investigation complete - SME/Lead provided resolution guidance without legal escalation

steps.title: Escalate to Legal Team
steps.description: Submit case to Legal after complete investigation and approval
steps.resolution: Complete fraud investigation submitted to Legal team for formal review
instructions: Prepare final investigation summary including: chronological order history, OPS team findings, user communication timeline, fraud suspicion points (if any), all documentation collected
Tag @legal-team in #ultrahuman-ring-cx Slack channel
Provide detailed compiled history and investigation notes
Set expectation with user: 2-3 working days for legal review
Await Legal's guidance before taking any next action
NOTE: Legal can assist only when there's formal dispute or when making explicit fraud allegation after internal investigation complete

title: Best Practices & Important Metrics
caseIdentifier: General guidelines for maintaining high-quality support standards and meeting key performance metrics
description: Essential best practices for tone, efficiency, and customer satisfaction

steps.title: Tonality Guidelines
steps.description: Maintain appropriate tone across all channels
instructions: ALWAYS: Friendly, natural tone - never overly apologetic. It's mutual process - you're helping user, user is helping you!
IN-APP CHAT: Chat-like conversations, sound light, friendly, proactive, super helpful

EMAILS: Detailed responses (reduce back-forth), sound light but detail-oriented, responsible, proactive, super helpful. Users email to escalate/complain/feel heard - run all checks, be put together, give closure
SOCIAL PLATFORMS: Chat-like conversations, sound light, friendly, super helpful
NEVER: Formal responses like 'Good Morning, Sir/Ma'am'. Use 'Hey!' / 'Hello!' / 'Hi there!'

steps.title: Efficiency Best Practices
steps.description: Work smart to resolve queries quickly
instructions: Be aware of different macros and shortcuts - makes resolving queries easier
When using macros, PERSONALIZE them - message shouldn't sound like template
Always aim to establish connection with users and ensure they feel heard
Close conversation when done answering all questions
While attending Kustomer messages, go back to 'Searches' page periodically to ensure no chats missed
Prioritize queries well - cover low-hanging fruit first, but identify impatient users
Feel free to add macros to make team's life easier - let team know when you do!

steps.title: Key Performance Metrics
steps.description: Understanding important metrics you're measured on
steps.resolution: Understanding of best practices and key metrics for high-quality support delivery
instructions: FRT (First Response Time): Respond with greeting like 'Hey!' / 'Hello!' / 'Hi there!' as soon as you see new message to maintain FRT
AHT (Average Handling Time): Measures how fast you resolve queries. Prioritize well - low-hanging fruit first, but be smart about identifying impatient users
CSAT Score (Customer Satisfaction): At end of each chat, users sent short satisfaction survey. Can rate conversation 1-5. Aim for high satisfaction by being helpful, efficient, and empathetic

title: Ring Replacement Policy - Comprehensive (Sept 2025)
caseIdentifier: User requests ring replacement due to defect, disconnection, data sync issues, or other hardware issues
description: Complete ring replacement policy including warranty validation, replacement count checks, UHX verification, regional warranty periods, and US trade restrictions

steps.title: MANDATORY Pre-Check 1: Replacement Count Validation
steps.description: Check how many replacements user has already received - CRITICAL STEP

conditions.conditionText: If replacements < 3

steps.title: MANDATORY Pre-Check 2: Activation Date & Warranty Period Validation
steps.description: Verify warranty eligibility based on activation date and user region - ZERO TOLERANCE FOR ERRORS
instructions: 🔍 CHECK ACTIVATION DATE: Note the activation date from OMS for the ORIGINAL (first ever) ring purchased by serial number
🌍 REGIONAL WARRANTY PERIODS:
• 1 YEAR: US, India, Canada (non-Costco), UK, UAE, Australia, Singapore, most Asia/Africa/LATAM countries
• 2 YEARS: EU countries (Germany, France, Netherlands, Belgium, Austria, Italy, Poland, etc.), Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, Canada (Costco rings only)
• 3 YEARS: Spain, Sweden, Portugal
📋 FOR NON-WEBSITE/MANUAL/RETAIL PURCHASES: Use invoice purchase date as source of truth instead of activation date
⚠️ IF ACTIVATION > WARRANTY PERIOD → Outside policy. Agent MAY deny replacement (escalation NOT mandatory for clear-cut denials)
✅ IF WITHIN WARRANTY PERIOD → Proceed to Step 3
⚠️ NOTE: UK is NOT EU - 1 year warranty only. Norway/Iceland are NOT EU but have 2-year warranty.
🔍 HYGIENE: Always check replacement logs as additional validation

💡 ESCALATION RULE: Escalation to leads is ONLY required when agent believes an exception should be made (e.g., 4th replacement, out-of-policy replacement). Clear-cut policy denials do NOT require escalation.

conditions.conditionText: If within warranty period

steps.title: UHX Subscription Verification
steps.description: Verify UltrahumanX subscription status if applicable
instructions: 🔍 CHECK UHX STATUS: Verify on OMS dashboard if UHX subscription is active
⚠️ DO NOT ASK USER if they purchased UHX - check the dashboard first. Only clarify if subscription not found on login email.
📋 UHX REPLACEMENT RULES:
• Non-UHX Users: Eligible for up to 3 replacements within standard 1-year warranty
• UHX 1-Year Plan: Eligible for up to 3 replacements within 1 year from ORIGINAL ring activation
• UHX 2-Year Plan: Eligible for up to 3 replacements within 2 years from ORIGINAL ring activation
• UHX Renewal: Users can renew within 15 days after 1-year plan expires to continue coverage
• 2-Year UHX = Maximum coverage available (no further renewal)
🔍 SPECIAL CASE: 1-Year (old) to 2-Year Transition:
- Verify if renewal occurred within 15 days of earlier plan expiration
- Consult SME/Leads for these cases
🔍 EDGE CASE: 1-Year (old) UHX renewed in 2025 and currently active → Treat ring as under warranty (consult SME/Lead)
⚠️ If UHX renewal NOT done within 15 days → May show 'Outside Policy' for Shopify orders → Flag to SME/Leads immediately

steps.title: Troubleshooting & Firmware Check
steps.description: Complete necessary troubleshooting before replacement - adjust based on user frustration level
instructions: ✅ IF USER IS FRUSTRATED + NOT ON LATEST FIRMWARE:
- AVOID asking them to update firmware unless specifically instructed
- If recent firmware update pushed within last 7 days → Avoid pushing update unless beneficial
- If user completed troubleshooting (TSW) and is clearly irritated → Skip further troubleshooting
✅ IF USER WITHIN POLICY + FRUSTRATED → Proceed with replacement directly
⚠️ IF USER OUTSIDE POLICY + FRUSTRATED → Offer trade-in or Wabi-Sabi ring (based on user preference)
📝 Leave internal note explaining why troubleshooting steps were skipped for context
💡 GOAL: Reduce friction, make customer feel supported not overwhelmed. Adjust tonality accordingly.
✅ IF TROUBLESHOOTING COMPLETED → Proceed to Step 5

steps.title: US Trade Restriction Check (Critical)
steps.description: Apply US-specific restrictions due to recent trade ruling
instructions: 🚫 US USERS OUT OF POLICY: NO Wabi Sabi rings. NO Trade-in offers.
📋 HOLDING RESPONSE FOR US USERS:

We've temporarily paused direct U.S. sales of the Ultrahuman Ring AIR following a recent trade ruling. While direct purchases are unavailable, some retailers may still have limited pre-ruling inventory for customers seeking to purchase the product. In the meantime, we're accelerating the launch of the next-generation Ultrahuman Ring and exploring U.S. manufacturing options to ensure our community continues to have access to Ultrahuman's technology in the future. You can read more details here. All other products and the Ultrahuman app are fully operational and available in the US.
✅ NON-US USERS: Standard replacement policy applies

steps.title: Replacement Execution (Within Policy)
steps.description: Process replacement for users within policy
steps.resolution: Replacement processed successfully with all mandatory checks completed
instructions: ✅ ELIGIBILITY CONFIRMED:
- Replacements < 3 ✓
- Within warranty period ✓
- Troubleshooting completed (or skipped due to frustration) ✓
📋 ACTION: Process standard ring replacement
📝 INTERNAL NOTE: Document replacement count, activation date, warranty period, UHX status

steps.title: Outside Policy Resolution
steps.description: Handle cases that don't meet replacement criteria - Agent CAN deny without escalation
steps.resolution: Out-of-policy case handled with appropriate alternative offered or explanation provided with empathetic tone
instructions: ❌ OUTSIDE POLICY SCENARIOS:
• Replacements already = 3 or more
• Activation date beyond warranty period
• UHX expired and not renewed within 15 days
✅ AGENT CAN DENY REPLACEMENT - Escalation is NOT mandatory for clear policy denials
🔄 OFFER ALTERNATIVES (if applicable):
• Trade-in option (if not US user)
• Wabi-Sabi ring (if not US user)
• User can choose preferred option
🚫 US USERS: NO trade-in or Wabi-Sabi offers. Provide US holding response from Step 5.
📝 Document reasoning in internal note
⚠️ EXCEPTION ESCALATION: Only escalate to @cx-leads if you believe a replacement IS warranted despite being outside policy (e.g., recurring hardware defects, exceptional circumstances)
💬 TONALITY IS CRITICAL: Even when denying, be empathetic, understanding, solution-focused. Acknowledge frustration, explain policy clearly but warmly. AVOID rigid/defensive language.
⚠️ CX QUALITY: A policy denial done with poor tone/rigid language is still a CX failure. The WAY you communicate matters as much as the decision.

🔍 EDGE CASE - RECURRING DEFECTS: If a REPLACEMENT ring fails shortly after being issued (e.g., 2-3 months), even if original warranty expired, consider the context. This may warrant softer handling or escalation for exception review - use CX judgment.

steps.title: Refund Guidelines
steps.description: Handle refund requests according to policy
steps.resolution: Refund processed or denied according to policy guidelines
instructions: 📋 REFUND ELIGIBILITY:
• Within 30 days of activation → Full refund (any reason, no questions asked)
• Up to 1 year from purchase → Push for replacement first. Refund only if faulty/defective (NOT 'changed mind', 'don't like it', 'uncomfortable')
• Out of warranty → No refunds
• 3 replacements done within 1st year + 4th issue occurs → Offer full refund
⚠️ EXTREME EXCEPTIONS: Loop in @cx-leads before processing
✅ ALWAYS complete necessary checks before actioning refund
📝 NOTE: Warranty period = 1 year (2 years for EU) from ORIGINAL ring activation date on OMS

title: Dead on Arrival
caseIdentifier: The user is trying to pair their new ring. The ring is experiencing an issue with starting up and pairing.
description: Troubleshooting flow for rings that won't start up or pair when new. Bot Entry: User selects 'DOA Issue' or mentions their new ring is not pairing immediately out of the box.

steps.title: Charger Test
steps.description: Let's troubleshoot your new ring. We'll start with a few quick checks to confirm the issue and guide you toward a resolution.
instructions: Let's troubleshoot your new ring. We'll start with a few quick checks to confirm the issue and guide you toward a resolution.
A couple of quick checks to proceed ahead with the troubleshooting here:

1. Could you please confirm the type of adapter that you are using with the charging dock (Brand name and whether it is a normal or fast charger)? The adapter should be within 20 watts and less than 2 AMPS. Please attach images of the adapter for reference.
2. Have you tested the charging cable with other devices to confirm its functionality? If possible, try using a different cable to rule out cable issues.
3. When you switch on the charging dock without placing the ring on it, does the LED light turn purple?
4. When you place the ring on the charging dock, does the LED light on the dock change to a breathing white light? If not, please flip the ring and observe the LED colour.
This information will help us narrow down the potential causes of the charging issue and provide more targeted solutions.
⚠️ If the charger does NOT show breathing white after placing the ring → Replace the charger

steps.title: New Ring Setup Flow
steps.description: If the above steps have not worked, we try the 'New Ring set up' flow
instructions: Can you please close your app, reopen it in 10 seconds, and let me know once done? (This step will allow our tech team to access your logs.)
Step 1: Unpair the Ring: Open your phone's Bluetooth settings and forget the device (listed as UH____).
Step 2: Toggle Bluetooth: Turn Bluetooth off and then back on.
Step 3: Reconnect the Ring: Restart your phone and reopen the app. Navigate to the 'Home' tab. Click on 'Connect Ring' and attempt to reconnect the ring.
If you're still unable to connect, proceed to step 4.

Step 4: Test Charging Accessories (to confirm your charger is functioning properly): Use a different cable and adapter to charge the ring. Charge the ring for about 15 minutes on each side using the new accessories.
If the issue continues, please share a screenshot of what you see when you click 'Connect Ring,' so we can help you further.

steps.title: Escalation Steps
steps.description: Push latest firmware, then factory reset the ring and enable Chill Mode to observe true drain rate
instructions: 1. Upgrade Firmware
2. Factory Reset
3. Enable Chill Mode
4. Observe
STEP 1 — UPGRADE FIRMWARE:
I have pushed the latest firmware to your ring.
Please quit the app completely, and reopen the app in a while.
If you don't see the Firmware Update pop-up, it should appear within the next few hours.
If it doesn't, please head to Ring Battery View > scroll down > 'Check for Firmware Update'.
Follow the prompts to complete the update.
STEP 2 — FACTORY RESET + CHILL MODE:
Please factory reset your ring: Ring Battery View > scroll down > Factory Reset > follow the prompts.
Keep the ring on the charger — you'll see a green LED light. The ring will disconnect from the app (expected).
Once you see the green light, remove the ring from the charger and reconnect.
Video guide: https://youtu.be/2CzUj0l6kWo
After the reset, immediately enable Chill Mode:
Ring homepage > ring icon (top right) > 'Choose a Battery Usage Mode' > Toggle on Chill Mode
Observe battery drain from 100% to 10% with Chill Mode on. Let us know when it reaches 10% so we can check the drain rate.

instructions: 📏 ASSESSING DISCREPANCY SCALE:
If comparing with another wearable and the difference is under 10%:
→ Inform user that each wearable tracks step data according to its algorithm

If step count is significantly off:
→ Check for fit and update firmware + soft reset on backend
→ Ask user to observe for another day after reset
If step count does not improve after all troubleshooting:
→ Inform user this will be improved in upcoming firmware updates
→ Flag to tech team for investigation if issue is severe

steps.title: Ring Fit & Firmware Check

instructions: 1. Ring Fit & Orientation
2. Push Latest Firmware
3. Observe
Applies to both: No sleep data at all, and Partial sleep data or missing sleep data chunks.
STEP 1 — CHECK RING FIT & ORIENTATION:
Confirm the ring fits snugly on the index, middle, or ring finger (not too tight or too loose).
Ensure the sensors (small bulge on the inner side emitting green lights) face the inner side of the palm.
Ask for a close-up image of the sensors on the ring.

Push the latest firmware if ring is not already on the latest version.
Ask the user to observe for another sleep cycle after the update.

steps.title: Sleep Diagnosis Check
steps.description: Check sleep diagnosis for HR and motion data — three main scenarios
instructions: 1. Check Sleep Diagnosis
2. Identify Scenario
3. Apply Fix
SCENARIO A — No data on dashboard at all:
→ Follow the 'Ring Data Not Uploading' SOP flow.
SCENARIO B — Likely Fit Issue:
Ring dashboard shows expected HR graph but Sleep diagnosis dashboard shows high motion or missing HR data.
→ Push a Soft Reset to the user.
→ Ask them to swap finger and observe for 24 hours.
SCENARIO C — Likely Sensor Issue:
Ring Dashboard: Ring State 10, missing HR data and/or missing temp data. Sleep diagnosis dashboard shows missing data.
→ Try a Factory Reset and also ask them to swap finger and observe for 24 hours.
Factory Reset: Ring Battery View > scroll down > Factory Reset > follow the prompts.

instructions: I have pushed the latest firmware to your ring.
Please quit the app completely and reopen the app in a while.
If you don't see the Firmware Update pop-up, it should appear within the next few hours.
If it doesn't, please head to ring battery view > scroll down > 'check for firmware update'.
Once it does, follow the prompts and update your firmware.
Once your firmware has been updated, please observe for a while.

conditions.conditionText: If disconnection issues stop after firmware update

steps.title: Bluetooth Reset
steps.description: Toggle Bluetooth and restart phone
instructions: Can you toggle your Bluetooth off and on, then restart your phone, and then check whether the ring is connecting?
Then let's keep it under observation for a few hours.
You can get back to me. I will be here to help you and keep this chat open.
Feel free to get back to me anytime—I'll be here to assist you.

conditions.conditionText: If disconnection issues stop after Bluetooth reset

steps.title: Replace Ring
steps.description: If issue still persists after all steps, replace the ring
steps.resolution: Replace the ring
instructions: Initiate ring replacement process
Tag as frequent disconnection hardware issue

steps.title: Issue Resolved
steps.description: Ring is now staying connected
steps.resolution: Issue resolved - Connection stable

title: Ring State 10 - No Contact Detected
caseIdentifier: The ring is not detecting any contact with the finger: The user's heart rate and skin temperature data do not appear on their homepage. Backend identifier: Ring state 10.
description: Troubleshooting flow for no contact detection issues

steps.title: Ring Fit Check
steps.description: Check the fit of the ring to ensure sensors are oriented properly
instructions: Can you confirm how the ring fits you? The ring can be worn on the index, middle, or ring finger and should fit snugly (not too tight or too loose).
To remove the ring, push from the bottom and slide it off.
For accurate readings, ensure the sensors, marked by a small bulge on the inner side of the ring emitting green lights, are facing the inner side of your palm.
Could you share a close-up image of the sensors on the ring? This would be the area with the small bump on the inner side of the ring.

steps.title: Firmware Update + Soft Reset
steps.description: Check firmware version, upgrade, and push a soft reset
instructions: Check the firmware version and upgrade to the relevant version.
Push a soft reset from the backend.
Run all checks and observe for improvement.

conditions.conditionText: If contact is now being detected

steps.title: Factory Reset
steps.description: Recommend a factory reset if issue persists
instructions: Please go ahead and factory reset your ring (Ring battery view > scroll down > factory reset > follow the prompts).
Once this is done, keep the ring on the charger, and you will notice a green LED light when the ring is placed on the charger.
At this point, the ring will disconnect from the phone, which is expected behavior.
Once you see the green light, remove the ring from the charger and connect the ring.
Video guide: https://youtu.be/2CzUj0l6kWo

conditions.conditionText: If contact is now being detected

steps.title: Workout Mode Test
steps.description: Try enabling workout mode to test sensor
instructions: Can you please try enabling the workout mode on the app for a few minutes and wait till your data populates?
This should fix the issue. You can then observe going forward - the data should sync fine.
Do let us know if your data doesn't populate here!

conditions.conditionText: If data populates during workout mode

steps.title: Replace Ring
steps.description: If nothing works, replace the ring
steps.resolution: Replace the ring
instructions: Initiate ring replacement process
Tag as State 10 / No contact detection failure

steps.title: Issue Resolved
steps.description: Ring is now detecting contact properly
steps.resolution: Issue resolved - Contact detection working

title: Ring Not Charging
caseIdentifier: The charger is working fine for the user, but the ring is not detecting the charge and picking up battery.
description: Troubleshooting flow for rings not charging despite working charger

steps.title: Ring Charger Test
steps.description: Verify charger functionality
instructions: Could you please confirm the type of adapter that you are using with the charging dock (Brand name and whether it is a normal or fast charger)? The adapter should be within 20 watts and less than 2 AMPS. Please attach images of the adapter for reference.
Have you tested the charging cable with other devices to confirm its functionality? If possible, try using a different cable to rule out cable issues.
When you switch on the charging dock without placing the ring on it, does the LED light turn purple?
When you place the ring on the charging dock, does the LED light on the dock change to a breathing white light? If not, please flip the ring and observe the LED colour.

conditions.conditionText: If charger is confirmed faulty

steps.title: Replace Charger
steps.description: Charger is faulty
steps.resolution: Replace the charger

steps.title: Check Ring Hardware
steps.description: Check for visible damage on the ring's hardware around sensors
instructions: If the charger is confirmed to be working fine, ask the user to check for any visible damage on the ring around its sensors.
Request relevant images for further assessment.

conditions.conditionText: If hardware damage is observed

steps.title: Replace Ring - Hardware Damage
steps.description: Visible hardware damage observed
steps.resolution: Replace the ring under 'hardware damage' reasoning

steps.title: Replace Ring - Battery Failure
steps.description: No visible damage but ring won't charge
steps.resolution: Replace the ring under 'battery failure' reasoning

title: Damaged Ring Causing User Discomfort
caseIdentifier: CRITICAL: Cases involving burns from overheating/electrical shocks, very tight ring causing finger swelling, allergic reactions, or any damaged ring causing user discomfort. Treat as HIGH PRIORITY - finger swelling from tight ring is a MEDICAL EMERGENCY.
description: Critical safety SOP for handling damaged rings causing burns, shocks, tight fit, allergic reactions, or physical discomfort. Requires immediate escalation and empathetic handling.

steps.title: CRITICAL: Assess Severity & Escalate
steps.description: Immediately identify if this is a medical emergency requiring urgent action
instructions: 🚨 TREAT AS CRITICAL - HIGH PRIORITY
Immediately loop in a lead and/or SME for guidance on per-case basis
SCENARIO A: Stuck Ring with Finger Swelling → MEDICAL EMERGENCY → Follow Step 2 immediately
SCENARIO B: Burns/Electrical Shocks → HIGH PRIORITY → Follow Step 3
SCENARIO C: Allergic Reaction/Rash → Follow Step 4
SCENARIO D: General Discomfort (non-emergency) → Follow Step 5
Always refer to Legal Template SOPs: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1rxxrgJzEnsGxGwuXb2porOufTqs5BKLv/edit
Loop in legal team if user mentions compensation, litigation, or settlement
⚠️ DO NOT proactively mention compensation/settlement terms yourself

conditions.conditionText: Is this a stuck ring with finger swelling?

steps.title: MEDICAL EMERGENCY: Stuck Ring Protocol
steps.description: Immediate action required - finger swelling can lead to loss of finger if not handled immediately
instructions: 🚨 THIS IS A MEDICAL EMERGENCY - ACT IMMEDIATELY
Arrange an immediate callback if not already on call
Guide user to closest hospital to have ring cut off (Harrington Ortho cutter or similar device)
Proactively ask for user's location → Check closest specialty hospitals
Call hospital to confirm they have ring cutting equipment → Inform them patient is coming
STAY ON THE CALL with user to reassure them until they reach hospital if necessary
Tone: Extremely empathetic and reassuring AT ALL TIMES
If ring not yet stuck but feeling tight, suggest:
- Use cold water and gentle soap, slowly twist and wiggle ring to remove
- Raise hand above head to encourage blood drainage, apply ice to reduce swelling, then retry removal

steps.title: Burns/Electrical Shock Protocol
steps.description: Handle burn or shock cases with urgency and gather evidence
instructions: Send template: 'Important Safety Notice – Please Stop Use'
Request user STOP using ring and charger immediately
Gather required evidence:
- Clear, well-lit photos of ring (inside, outside, different angles - entirety of surface)
- Exact or approximate date and time when incident occurred
- Photos of the injury/burn
- Medical note if available
- Order number and serial number
Arrange for ring to be returned (RTO) in UNTOUCHED form after incident
Ring MUST be RTOd back to India for mech design team evaluation
Escalate to engineering team for immediate review
Once requirements fulfilled, escalate to legal team
Request user's patience empathetically while working on resolution

steps.title: Allergic Reaction/Skin Rash Protocol
steps.description: Handle skin irritation cases with care and evidence collection
instructions: Send template: 'We're Here to Help with Your Ultrahuman Ring Experience'
Request user STOP using device immediately
Gather evidence:
- Brief description of what occurred
- Photos of rash/irritation
- Serial number of device
- Date of purchase
- Approximate date symptoms began in relation to product use
If medical attention required, request:
- Copy of medical bill/documentation
- Approximate date of incident
Forward case to specialist team for expert review
Escalate for internal evaluation
Send follow-up template: 'Follow-Up on Your Ring Concern'

steps.title: General Discomfort (Non-Emergency)
steps.description: Handle non-critical discomfort cases
instructions: Empathize with user's concern
Request photos and description of discomfort
Assess if size/fit issue → Offer sizing exchange if within return period
Check if engraving issue → Follow engraving SOP
If physical damage to ring → Request RTO for evaluation
Offer standard resolution: replacement or refund based on assessment

steps.title: Post-Emergency Resolution
steps.description: After immediate medical treatment or urgent handling
instructions: Offer IMMEDIATE refund or replacement based on customer preference
Offer reimbursement of any hospital/medical bills paid for injury treatment/ring removal
Schedule at least 2 follow-ups:
- Day after incident
- 2 days after that
- Additional follow-ups based on severity
Consider sending delight/merchandise based on case and situation
Ensure all communications maintain extremely empathetic and reassuring tone

conditions.conditionText: Was defect confirmed in ring?

steps.title: Medical Evaluation - Allergic Reaction
steps.description: Determine if product defect exists or goodwill resolution needed
instructions: Await specialist team evaluation results
Review medical documentation if provided
Assess if product fault identified

conditions.conditionText: Was product defect confirmed?

steps.title: Defect Confirmed - Full Resolution
steps.description: Product fault identified, provide comprehensive resolution
steps.resolution: Full resolution: Medical reimbursement + refund/replacement + settlement documentation
instructions: Send template: 'Product Assessment – Resolution Details' or 'Reimbursement and Support'
Offer:
- Reimbursement of documented medical expenses
- Refund OR replacement ring (customer choice)
- Prepaid return label if customer wishes to send product for review
Check with legal before dispatching settlement agreement
May share brief settlement confirmation to document resolution
Close case with empathy and care

steps.title: No Defect Found - Goodwill Resolution
steps.description: Evaluation found no product defect, offer goodwill gesture
steps.resolution: Goodwill resolution: Medical reimbursement + refund/replacement (no defect confirmed)
instructions: Send template: 'Resolution Offer Regarding Your Ultrahuman Ring' or 'Assessment Outcome'
For rash/burn cases: 'Evaluation did not identify product defect or safety issue'
Offer as goodwill gesture:
- One-time reimbursement of documented out-of-pocket medical expenses
- Refund OR replacement ring (customer preference)
For shock cases with no fault:
- Send new charger as courtesy
- Extend warranty by 6 months
May share short acknowledgment form to complete process
Ensure resolution closes matter respectfully

steps.title: Standard Resolution
steps.description: Non-critical case resolved with standard process
steps.resolution: Resolved via standard replacement or refund process

title: User Data Migration Between Accounts
caseIdentifier: User wants to transfer all their app data (from Ring or M1) from an old email ID (Account A) to a new email ID (Account B). This includes in-app email change requests.
description: Complete process for migrating user data between accounts, handling email changes, Apple Private Relay IDs, and platform switches (iOS to Android).

steps.title: Collect Account Information
steps.description: Request both email IDs and reason for transfer
instructions: Ask user to share:
• Account A - Current account that holds the data (may be the account they're contacting from on Kustomer)
• Account B - New email ID they want to move data to
• Reason for the transfer
Template Response:
➡️ Please confirm the email address currently linked to your data, along with the new email ID you'd like to move your data to.
If reason not provided, add:

Also, do let us know the reason for the email change. For example, are you switching devices (like moving from iOS to Android), or is it simply a personal preference? This helps us ensure everything goes smoothly and nothing gets missed.

steps.title: Verify Account B Status
steps.description: Check if Account B exists and has any data
instructions: Search the dashboard to verify Account B status:
• Internal > Users (for general account info)
• Ring Data > Ring Dashboards (for Ring data)
• Internal > CGM Stints (for M1 data)
Check if Account B:
1. Already exists in system
2. Has any data or activity (login history, device pairing, etc.)
IMPORTANT: Check for Apple Private Relay IDs (emails ending in @privaterelay.appleid.com)

conditions.conditionText: Does Account B exist with data?

steps.title: Request Account B Deletion
steps.description: Account B has existing data - user must delete it first
instructions: ⚠️ Account B already has data - must be deleted before migration
Send template:
➡️ It looks like your new email (Account B) is already linked to an existing account with some data. In order to move your data from your old account, we'll need you to delete this new account first.
Please log in to the app using Account B, head to Profile → Settings → Delete Account. Once this is done, log in using Account A and let us know.
Please note that any data linked to this account will be permanently lost, so do proceed only if that's okay.
Wait for user confirmation of deletion before proceeding to Step 4

steps.title: Check for No-Data Scenario
steps.description: Verify if Account A has any data before proceeding
instructions: Before raising migration request, check if Account A has ANY data:
• Device paired?
• Metrics generated?
• Any activity history?
If NO data exists on Account A → Go to 'no-data-resolution'
If data exists → Proceed to Step 4

conditions.conditionText: Does Account A have any data?

steps.title: Raise Data Transfer Request
steps.description: Submit migration request to cx-datatransfer team
instructions: ✅ Confirm prerequisites met:
• Account A (source) and Account B (target) email IDs received
• Account B is either deleted OR never used
Raise request to @cx-datatransfer team on cx-data-transfer-requests channel
Fill the data-transfer-form with required details
Template for flagging:
➡️ @cxdatatransfer User has requested data transfer from Account A (old@email.com) to Account B (new@email.com).

steps.title: Confirm Migration Complete
steps.description: Notify user after successful data transfer
steps.resolution: Data successfully migrated to new email account
instructions: Once cx-datatransfer team confirms completion, send:
➡️ Your data has now been successfully moved to your new email ID. You can now log in to the app using this email and access all your previous data.
Verify user can successfully log in and access their data
Close the ticket

steps.title: No Data - Simple Re-login
steps.description: Account has no data, no migration needed
steps.resolution: No migration needed - user re-logged with preferred email
instructions: If user has just signed up with no data linked (no device paired, no metrics):
No need to raise data migration request
Send template:
➡️ Since there's no data associated with your current account yet, you can just log out and log back in using your preferred email. That'll set things up exactly how you need — no data will be lost.
User simply logs out and logs back in with preferred email

steps.title: Apple Private Relay Email Guidance
steps.description: Handle Apple Private Relay IDs (@privaterelay.appleid.com)
steps.resolution: Guided user on Apple Private Relay ID usage
instructions: ℹ️ Apple Private Relay emails end in @privaterelay.appleid.com
This is a masked, Apple-generated email forwarding to actual Apple ID
Works normally within Apple ecosystem - no action needed unless switching platforms
Template for general info:
➡️ Your account is linked to an Apple Private Relay ID — this is just a masked version of your Apple email and works normally within the Apple ecosystem.

There's no need to migrate your data unless you're planning to switch to an Android device. In that case, we recommend moving your data to a regular email ID (like Gmail) to avoid any login or access issues outside of Apple's system.
If switching iOS → Android: Treat as standard Account A → Account B transfer

title: Ultrahuman Home: The Future of Healthy Living
caseIdentifier: Questions about Ultrahuman Home device - purchase, shipping, features, sensors, biomarkers, setup, integrations, and troubleshooting.
description: Comprehensive FAQ covering all aspects of Ultrahuman Home including availability, specifications, features, and usage guidance.

steps.title: Purchase & Shipping Information
steps.description: Handle questions about buying and receiving Ultrahuman Home
instructions: 📍 WHERE TO BUY:
• Ultrahuman Home can be purchased via our website
• Now available for purchase on our website
📦 SHIPPING:
• Ships within 5-7 business days
• May be subject to taxes, customs duties, and fees (borne by recipient)
📋 RETURN POLICY:
• 30-day return policy
• 12-month warranty covering electronics and sensors (excluding mechanical damage)
📦 UNBOXING:
• Ultrahuman Home device
• USB-C cable for power
• Notecard with message
• Product information brochure

conditions.conditionText: Is this a technical/feature question?

steps.title: Product Specifications & Design
steps.description: Provide technical specifications and design details
instructions: 🎨 DESIGN & BUILD:
• Made from anodized aluminum
• Available in single color variant
• Single variant with optional microphone (can be switched off)
• Expected lifespan: Industry-grade sensors, built for years of reliable performance
⚡ POWER & CONNECTIVITY:
• Power consumption: 2 Watts
• No calibration period required
• iOS 15+ or Android 6+ required
• Wi-Fi range: up to 20 feet
• Bluetooth range: up to 8 feet
🔒 PRIVACY & SAFETY:
• No camera (uses Infrared sensor)
• Local audio processing
• Physical mic cut-off button
• Standard EMF emission (comparable to TV/Wi-Fi device)
• Safe for pregnant women and children

conditions.conditionText: Is this about sensors or biomarkers?

steps.title: Sensors & Biomarkers
steps.description: Explain sensor capabilities and biomarker measurements
instructions: 🔬 SENSORS INCLUDED:
• Temperature sensors (room temperature)
• Humidity sensors (moisture levels)
• Particulate matter sensors (air quality - PM1, PM2.5, PM10)
• Precision microphones (noise levels, sleep disturbances)
• Natural light sensors (Vitamin D levels, UV)
• Blue light sensors (circadian rhythm impact)
• CO & CO2 monitors
• Infrared sensor (temperature mapping, no camera)
📊 BIOMARKERS MEASURED:
• Temperature, humidity, particulate matter
• Noise levels, smoke levels
• Blue light levels, UV light levels
• Real-time continuous sampling
• Highly accurate (calibrated against industry standards)
🏠 COVERAGE:
• Single device covers ~500 square feet
• Can install multiple devices for larger homes
• App consolidates locations into 'Ultraspace'

steps.title: Features & Health Benefits
steps.description: Explain specific health monitoring features
instructions: ☀️ SUNLIGHT MONITORING:
• Photo-detecting sensors monitor UVA, UVB, UVC
• Track sunlight exposure throughout the day
🔵 BLUE LIGHT MANAGEMENT:
• Blue light exposure sensors
• Insights into circadian rhythm impact
• Sleep-wake cycle optimization
🔊 NOISE DETECTION:
• Optimize sleep quality by monitoring noise levels
• Detect optimal noise bands for day/night
• Snore detection for sleep apnea indicators
🌡️ TEMPERATURE TRACKING:
• Monitor room temperature fluctuations
• Optimize bedroom temperature for sleep
• Body cooling correlation for better REM sleep
💨 AIR QUALITY:
• Detect pollen, particulate matter, CO/CO2
• Real-time alerts for poor air quality
• Long-term respiratory health improvement

steps.title: Setup & Usage Guidance
steps.description: Provide optimal setup and usage recommendations
steps.resolution: Comprehensive Ultrahuman Home information provided
instructions: 📍 OPTIMAL PLACEMENT:
• Recommended: Bedroom & spaces where you spend most time
• Best results: Bedside table placement
• Allows tracking of UV light, temperature, air quality + sleep sounds
👥 MULTI-USER ACCESS:
• Up to 10 people can access data simultaneously (cloud sharing)
• Only 1 user can connect for settings/diagnostics at a time
📱 DATA & INTEGRATIONS:
• Data stored for 15 days on device
• Cloud backup available
• Export data feature (available via software update Q3 2024)
• Apple HomeKit compatible
• Thread protocol support
• IFTTT integration (Google Home, Apple Home, Amazon Alexa)
✈️ AIRPLANE MODE:
• Can disable Wi-Fi/Bluetooth
• Continues tracking, syncs when mode disabled
🔮 UPCOMING FEATURES:
• Smoke detection (CO/CO2 increase alerts) - end of year
• Data export feature - Q3 2024
